creator: crest@bultmann.eu
text: The HTML docs and manpages are generated from the same sources and require the same dependencies (asciidoc and xmlto). The resulting HTML documentation and manpages are tiny and not known to conflict with any other port. The only reason I made the documentation optional is to avoid the build dependencies on xmlto and asciidoc. In my opinion there is no good reason to generate but not install the HTML documentation.
